# Refrigerator Houston Repair

> Professional refrigerator repair in Houston, TX and surrounding areas. Expert technicians, same-day service, all major brands.

## Contact
- Phone: (346) 512-3688
- Email: info@refrigeratorhoustonrepair.com
- Hours: Mon-Sun 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM
- Location: Houston, TX

## Services
We repair all major refrigerator brands including Sub-Zero, Thermador, LG, Samsung, GE, Whirlpool, KitchenAid, Viking, Bosch, Scotsman, Jenn-Air, Maytag, Amana, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Hisense, Insignia, ZLine, Kenmore, Miele.

## Service Areas
Houston, Katy, Sugar Land, Spring, Memorial, Cypress, Richmond, Fulshear, Seabrook, The Woodlands, Pearland, Pasadena, Texas City, Galveston, League City, Friendswood, Baytown, Clear Lake, Webster, Conroe, Magnolia, Klein, Tomball, Humble, Kemah, Deer Park, La Porte

## Technicians
- Serhii T. — Lead Refrigeration Technician, Sub-Zero and sealed systems specialist
- Alex Z. — Refrigeration Technician, EPA Section 608 certified
